def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    short_ma = df['close'].rolling(window=params['short_window']).mean()
    long_ma = df['close'].rolling(window=params['long_window']).mean()
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window'])
    signals = np.where((short_ma > long_ma) & (rsi > params['rsi_threshold']), 1,
                     np.where((short_ma < long_ma) & (rsi < params['rsi_threshold']), -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits trend-following behavior confirmed by RSI momentum thresholds, filtering signals with moving average crossovers.
